title: iso42001_impact_fairness_minimal — ISO/IEC 42001 A.5 Disparate-Impact Re-Derivation (Axis-2)
claim_boundary: Proves the disclosed A.5 disparate-impact ratio (EEOC four-fifths min/max group rate) is re-derivable from the declared per-subject outcomes and tamper-evident under the auditor's pinned rule. NOT a judgement that the groups/outcomes are correctly recorded, that this is the right fairness measure, or ISO/IEC 42001 control conformance. Synthetic data; no customer.
